mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, profile_version_id, age, income_year, gender, employment_type, residence_type, loan_purpose, total_debt, existing_loan_count, created_at, judgable FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT id, user_id, profile_version_id, age, income_year, gender, employment_type, residence_type, loan_purpose, total_debt, existing_loan_count, created_at, judgable FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND profile_version_id = #{profileVersionId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT user_profile_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO user_profile ( id, user_id, profile_version_id, age, income_year, gender, employment_type, residence_type, loan_purpose, total_debt, existing_loan_count, created_at, judgable ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{profileVersionId}, #{age}, #{incomeYear}, #{gender}, #{employmentType}, #{residenceType}, #{loanPurpose}, #{totalDebt}, #{existingLoanCount}, #{createdAt}, #{judgable} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, profile_version_id, age, income_year, gender, employment_type, residence_type, loan_purpose, total_debt, existing_loan_count, created_at, judgable FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
